title: Verkoso: SOFC Integration Progress Update
author: Clemens Grosjean
excerpt: Fraunhofer IKTS collaboration advances syngas-to-power conversion efficiency through solid oxide fuel cell integration.
content:
Project Verkoso continues to make progress in integrating our X-150 syngas output with solid oxide fuel cell (SOFC) technology for combined heat and power applications.

Project Partners:
- Fraunhofer Institute for Ceramic Technologies and Systems (IKTS)
- Dr. Mihails Kusnezoff

Technical Focus:
- Syngas quality optimization for SOFC compatibility
- Methane and hydrogen-rich syngas production
- Integration architecture development
- Efficiency measurements

Current Status:
Active development phase with regular testing at Fraunhofer IKTS facilities in Dresden.

Goals:
- Demonstrate SOFC integration with X-150 output
- Achieve combined heat and power efficiencies above 80%
- Validate long-term operational stability
- Create blueprint for commercial CHP deployments
